Title: Weigelt, Curt H.
Subject Area: catalogues raisonnés|Italian (culture or style)|Italian Renaissance-Baroque styles|Renaissance
Overview: Giotto scholar; notes about Weigelt's opinions appear in Richard Offner's annotated catalog of the 1937 Mostra Giottesca.
Selected Bibliography: Duccio di Buoninsegna: Studien zur Geschichte der frühsienesischen Tafelmalerei. Leipzig: K. W. Hiersemann, 1911; Sienese Painting of the Trecento. Florence: Pantheon casa editrice/Paris, The Pegasus Press, 1930.
Sources: Ladis, Andrew. "The Unmaking of a Connoisseur." in, Offner, Richard. A Discerning Eye: Essays on Early Italian Painting. University Park, PA: Pennsylvania State University Press, 1998, p,19, note 1;
